description: Allows the mob to randomly sit for a duration.

cooldown.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

min_sit_time.description: The minimum amount of time in seconds before the mob will stand back up

start_chance.description: This is the chance that the mob will start this goal, from 0 to 1

stop_chance.description: This is the chance that the mob will stop this goal, from 0 to 1

title: minecraft:behavior.random_sitting
